basic_details.job_title: IISER Mohali Library Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Mohali
basic_details.short_information: IISER Mohali invites applications for 03 Library Professional posts on temporary basis.

age_limit.age_details: Initially 01 year, extendable up to 02 years

qualification.details: Candidates must possess the following essential qualifications: | Any Bachelor’s Degree (Preference to B.Sc.) Master’s Degree in Library & Information Science (MLISc) or equivalent Consistent good academic and conduct record | Desirable: | Knowledge of Computers, IT & digital applications in libraries Degree in Computer Science will be preferred Good communication skills in English and Hindi

salary_details.details: Rs.18,000/- per month in First Year Rs.20,000/- per month in Second Year.

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates should send the duly filled application form along with self-attested copies of all relevant documents to the address below by **13.08.2026**.
Address: The Registrar, Despatch Section, Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Mohali, Sector-81, Knowledge City, P.O. Manauli, S.A.S. Nagar (Mohali), Punjab – 140306
Additionally, candidates must send the synopsis by email to **[email protected]** or fill the Google form.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and does not confer any right for permanent employment. Incomplete or late applications will be rejected. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further process (written test/interview). Age relaxation as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Mohali Library Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for IISER Mohali Library Professional Recruitment 2026 is 13 August 2026 (up to 5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IISER Mohali Library Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: IISER Mohali has announced 3 Library Professional (on training) vacancies, including 2 posts for SC candidates and 1 post for EWS candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for IISER Mohali Library Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have any Bachelor's Degree (preferably B.Sc.) along with a Master's Degree in Library & Information Science (MLISc) or equivalent. Knowledge of computers, digital library applications, and good communication skills are desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IISER Mohali Library Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years for EWS candidates and 35 years for SC candidates as on the last date of application. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for IISER Mohali Library Professional posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹18,000 during the first year and ₹20,000 during the second year of training.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IISER Mohali Library Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of applications, followed by a written test and/or interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be invited for the selection process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for IISER Mohali Library Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline. Candidates must send the completed application form with supporting documents to IISER Mohali and also email the application synopsis or submit it through the prescribed Google Form.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the IISER Mohali Library Professional engagement?
faq.answer: The engagement is initially for one year and may be extended up to a maximum of two years based on performance and institute requirements.
